title: zannichellia peltata
intro: Zannichellia peltata, also known as hornwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Zannichelliaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing coughs. Herbal preparations of Zannichellia peltata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
